## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.0

This release rolls up the 1.2.6.x camera, MQTT, device-support, and documentation updates into the next stable version.

### 🎥 Camera Live View
- Adds native Home Assistant WebRTC live view with video and audio for supported X-Sense cameras.
- Keeps camera playback native to Home Assistant without AlexxIT/WebRTC, go2rtc, aiortc, or transcoding.
- Aligns camera discovery, live resolution, signaling, codec, audio, and supported controls with the Android app behavior.

### 🔔 Camera AI Notifications
- Adds native Home Assistant event entities for supported camera AI detections.
- Adds the X-Sense Camera AI Detection blueprint for simple Home Assistant notification automations.
- Keeps last AI detection and related timestamp sensors as history values for dashboards and conditions.

### 🔧 Integration Reliability
- Bundles the X-Sense API client directly and removes the external `python-xsense` dependency.
- Improves MQTT shadow handling, device matching, login/session recovery, and cloud polling efficiency.
- Expands X-Sense-reported entities, device actions, writable settings, diagnostics, and cleanup of stale software-version entities.

### 📚 Documentation
- Updates the README camera summary to cover native live view and AI notifications.
- Documents the blueprint import button and AI notification event setup in all language README files.
- Keeps the 1.2.6.x notes available in the changelog while the GitHub Releases page moves forward from 1.3.0.
